summary: Completed comprehensive testing of B2B Agency Panel features. All 23 backend API tests passed (100%). All 7 frontend pages tested successfully - Agency Dashboard, Users, Bookings, Transactions, Settings, Registration, and Admin Agencies management.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login and authentication
Backend: Agency owner login with agency_owner role
Backend: Admin can list all agencies
Backend: Admin can filter agencies by status
Backend: Non-admin denied access to agency list (403)
Backend: Agency owner can get their agency details
Backend: Admin can get any agency details
Backend: Agency owner can update their agency
Backend: Agency dashboard API returns stats and recent bookings
Backend: Admin can add credit to agency
Backend: Admin can debit credit from agency
Backend: Admin can update commission rate
Backend: Agency owner can list their users
Backend: Agency owner can create sub-user
Backend: Agency owner can update sub-user
Backend: Agency owner can deactivate sub-user
Backend: Agency owner can list their bookings
Backend: Agency owner can filter bookings by status
Backend: Agency owner can list credit transactions
Backend: Agency registration requires authentication
Backend: Agency owner cannot access other agency data
Backend: Non-admin cannot modify agency credit
Backend: Non-admin cannot modify agency commission
Frontend: Agency Dashboard loads with welcome message and stats
Frontend: Agency Dashboard shows credit limit, available credit, bookings, revenue
Frontend: Agency Dashboard shows quick actions and commission info
Frontend: Agency Users page lists users with roles
Frontend: Agency Users - Add User dialog works
Frontend: Agency Bookings page with search and filter
Frontend: Agency Transactions page shows balance cards and history
Frontend: Agency Settings page with company info and financial tabs
Frontend: Agency Registration page with form and benefits
Frontend: Admin Agencies page lists agencies with actions
Frontend: Admin can see Credit and Commission buttons

features_tested.agency_registration: Working - form with company info, contact info, benefits list
features_tested.agency_dashboard: Working - stats cards, quick actions, commission info, recent bookings
features_tested.agency_users: Working - list users, add/edit/deactivate sub-users with roles
features_tested.agency_bookings: Working - list with search and status filter
features_tested.agency_transactions: Working - balance cards, transaction history table
features_tested.agency_settings: Working - company info form, financial tab with commission/credit info
features_tested.admin_agencies: Working - list agencies, approve, credit management, commission settings

context_for_next_testing_agent: B2B Agency Panel fully functional. Test agency 'ABC Turizm' exists with ₺50,500 credit. Agency owner is elif@gmail.com. All CRUD operations for agencies and sub-users working. Admin can manage credit and commission. Payment system is MOCKED (iyzico in mock mode).

mocked_apis.payment: iyzico payment system is in mock mode - bookings auto-confirm with PAID status
